name: Tumblefire
short_description: Third-person Wild West heist sandbox with realistic fire spread, faction AI, and stealth. Rob handcrafted frontier towns, manipulate Sheriff-vs-Bandit conflicts, and escape before you burn it all down. Solo or drop-in co-op.
detailed_description:
A Wild West Where Fire Changes Everything


Drop into a handcrafted frontier town. Three factions are already at war.
You're just there to get paid — and maybe burn a few things down.

How You Play Is Up To You


Go Ghost — Complete heists without a single witness. Let the
Sheriff and Bandits fight it out while you walk away clean.

Start a Fire — Tumblefire's signature mechanic. Fire spreads
realistically through wooden buildings, changes sightlines, creates
diversions, and sometimes gets wildly out of control.

Play the Factions — Sheriff's Department, Bandits, and Citizens
all have their own agendas. Learn their patterns. Exploit their conflicts.
Rob the bank during a gunfight you started.

Bring a Friend — Drop-in co-op for one friend via Steam.
Two outlaws, twice the chaos.

Key Features

  • Handcrafted frontier towns with unique layouts and objectives
  • Realistic fire spread that reacts to wind, materials, and structures
  • Three AI factions with distinct behavior and faction conflicts
  • Multiple playstyle approaches: stealth, arson, manipulation, or all three
  • Meta-progression skill trees purchased with mission earnings
  • Solo or drop-in co-op via Steam

Currently in Early Access. [See our roadmap in Discord.]
